title: chrysanthellum involutum
intro: Chrysanthellum involutum, also known as Florida pennywort or yellow buttons, is a perennial plant native to the southeastern United States and the West Indies. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it effective in treating various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin irritations. The plant's medicinal properties include its ability to reduce inflammation, kill bacteria, and boost the immune system, resulting in health benefits such as pain relief, improved digestion, and enhanced respiratory function. Chrysanthellum involutum can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat a range of health issues.
